[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: This image is a close-up, stylized cartoon portrait of a white-haired character with a wide open mouth and a pale pink tongue, shown from a slightly low angle against a muted background.

The main subject is a character with light gray or white short hair and thick dark eyebrows. Their face is pale with rounded cheeks, a small nose, and an open mouth with a visible pale pink tongue. They are wearing a dark outer garment with visible shoulder area and gold leaf-like highlights, and a lighter collar with a teal-blue bow tied near the neck. A hand or arm-like shape appears on the right side of the frame, partially visible and angled diagonally upward.

The background appears to be a simple, muted scene with soft gray and greenish tones and indistinct shapes, suggesting an outdoor or garden-like setting, though the exact location is unclear. Lighting looks flat and cartoon-like, with minimal shadows.

No important visible text detected.

The image shows a stylized cartoon character in close-up, facing upward or toward the camera with an open mouth. A partially visible arm or hand appears on the right side, and the character’s dark clothing and teal bow are prominent.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
